Potato sh-Oligopeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by potato, Solanum tuberosum , after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Epidermal Growth Factor. It contains a maximum of 53 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids
Hydroxylated 2-Octanol is the mixture of alcohols formed by the hydroxylation of 2-octanol.
Vitis Amurensis Root Extract is the extract of the roots of  Vitis amurensis, Vitaceae.
Citrus Unshiu Fruit/Sucrose Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the spontaneous fermentation of the fruit of  Citrus unshiu  and sucrose.
Glyceryl Methacrylate is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Sodium Silver Thioctoyl Hyaluronate is the complex formed by the reaction of Sodium Thioctoyl Hyaluronate with either silver acetate or silver nitrate.
Galactosyl Glycerol is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Dihexyl Isoeicosanedioate is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Isosorbide Dicaprylate/Caprate is the diester of isosorbide and a mixture of caprylic and capric acids.
Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Seedcake Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground seedcake of Rubus idaeus, Rosaceae.
Phyllostachys Bambusoides Rhizome Extract is the extract of the rhizomes of  Phyllostachys bambusoides, Poaceae.

Sterculia Platanifolia Flower/Leaf/Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds, leaves and flowers of  Sterculia plantifolia.  The accepted scientific name for  Sterculia plantifolia  is  Firmiana simplex,  Malvaceae.
Polygonatum Odoratum Rhizome Extract is the extract of the rhizomes of  Polygonatum odoratum, Asparagaceae.
Eleocharis Dulcis Tuber Extract is the extract of the tubers of  Eleocharis dulcis, Cyperaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: BIFIDOBACTERIUM/LACTOBACILLUS ACANTHOPANAX KOREANUM ROOT EXTRACT FERMENT
chemicalDescription: Bifidobacterium/Lactobacillus Acanthopanax Koreanum Root Extract Ferment is the product obtained by the fermentation of Acanthopanax Koreanum Root Extract by the microorganisms,  Bifidobacterium  and  Lactobacillus.
inciName: BIFIDOBACTERIUM/LACTOBACILLUS ACANTHOPANAX KOREANUM ROOT EXTRACT FERMENT

chemicalDescription: sh-Oligopeptide-83 Amide is a single chain human peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Osteopontin and contains 19 amino acids. Osteopontin contains a maximum of 314 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Pediococcus Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of a growth media by the microorganism,  Pediococcus,  Lactobacillaceae.
Pteris Dispar Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Pteris dispar, Pteridaceae.
Sodium Cocoyl Hydrolyzed Royal Jelly is the sodium salt of the condensation product of coconut acid chloride with the hydrolysate of Royal Jelly.

Potato sh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by transgenic potato,  Solanum tuberosum, after the transient expression or stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA.
Polysorbate 20 Dicinnamate is the product obtained by the reaction of Polysorbate 20 and Cinnamic Acid
Hydrolyzed Cladosiphon Novae-Caledoniae Extract is the hydrolysate of Cladosiphon Novae-Caledoniae Extract derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Human Adipose Stromal Cell Exosomes are vesicles that are secreted into the conditioned media by human adipose derived stromal cells.
Arachideth-27 is the polyethylene glycol ether of Arachidyl Alcohol that conforms to the formula where n has an average value of 27.
Scenedesmus Deserticola Ferment Extract is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the alga,  Scenedesmus deserticola,  Scenedesmaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: RICE FERMENT FILTRATE/PERSICARIA TINCTORIA LEAF FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Rice Ferment Filtrate (Sake)/Persicaria Tinctoria Leaf Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the spontaneous fermentation of the leaves of  Persicaria tinctoria  and Rice Ferment Filtrate (Sake) .
inciName: RICE FERMENT FILTRATE/PERSICARIA TINCTORIA LEAF FERMENT FILTRATE

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HYDROLYZED PANAX GINSENG MERISTEM CELL EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Hydrolyzed Panax Ginseng Meristem Cell Extract is the hydrolysate of Panax Ginseng Meristem Cell Extract derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
inciName: HYDROLYZED PANAX GINSENG MERISTEM CELL EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Antrodia Cinnamomea Extract is the extract of the fungus,  Antrodia cinnamomea, Fomitopsidaceae.
Enterococcus Faecium is the bacteria,  Enterococcus faecium.
Perichlaena Richardii Flower/Leaf Extract is the extract of the flowers and leaves of  Perichlaena richardii, Bignoniaceae.
